title: Relics: Alex's Mobs Compat
description: Compatibility addon between Relics and Alex's Mobs
body:
Relics: Alex's Mobs Compat (RAM-Compat) is an addon designed to seamlessly integrate with two popular Minecraft mods: Relics and Alex's Mobs. Relics is a mod that introduces a variety of unique and powerful artifacts into the game, each with its own special abilities and lore. Alex's Mobs, on the other hand, adds a diverse range of new creatures to Minecraft, each with distinct behaviors and characteristics. RAM-Compat bridges these two mods by introducing new relics that are specifically tailored to the mechanics and creatures introduced in Alex's Mobs. This integration not only expands the variety of relics available, but also ensures that they are thematically and functionally consistent with the creatures and features of Alex's Mobs, thereby enhancing the overall gameplay experience for users of both mods.

This mod requires [Relics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/relics-mod) and [Alex's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-mobs)!
